_about: Example PreToolUse hook for fork-policy visibility. Logs every Task tool call to ~/.claude/fork-policy.log so you can audit how often named subagent_type is used vs. omitted (fork mode). Does NOT block by default — visibility only.
_install: Merge into ~/.claude/settings.json under the 'hooks' key (or create the key). Restart Claude Code.
_upgrade_to_block: Replace the inner 'command' string with:  jq -e '.tool_input.subagent_type' >/dev/null 2>&1 && { echo 'fork policy: named subagent_type forbidden in this project' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0
_block_note: Exit code 2 instructs Claude Code to block the tool use (per the hooks contract). Exit 0 lets it proceed.
